description: Offline US medical code lookup and crosswalk — ICD-10-CM/PCS, HCPCS Level II, RxNorm. Keyless.
name: io.github.cyanheads/medical-codes-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path override for the bundled SQLite index. Defaults to the packaged data/medical-codes.db.
environmentVariables.name: MEDCODE_DB_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Cap on rows returned by search and browse tools (default 50, hard ceiling 200).
environmentVariables.name: MEDCODE_MAX_RESULTS
